src/modules/narrative/constants/localizedScenes.ts:export const getScenesByCity = (city: string): LocalizedScene[] => {
src/modules/narrative/constants/localizedScenes.ts:  const matched = LOCALIZED_SCENES.filter(s => city.includes(s.city) || s.city.includes(city));
src/modules/narrative/constants/localizedScenes.ts:  if (matched.length > 0) return matched;

src/modules/narrative/constants/localizedScenes.ts:  return [...matched, ...liminal];

src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:import { OutfitV2 } from "../../../shared/types/types";
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:// Key for local storage
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:const STORAGE_KEY = 'pavora_user_wardrobe';
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:/**
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts: * Service to manage user-defined outfits.
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts: */
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:export const WardrobeService = {
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:  /**
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:   * Get all user-defined outfits from localStorage.
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:   */
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:  getUserOutfits(): OutfitV2[] {
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:    try {
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:      const stored = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:      if (!stored) return [];
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:      return JSON.parse(stored);
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:    } catch (e) {
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:      console.error("Failed to load user wardrobe:", e);
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:      return [];
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:    }
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:  },
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:  /**
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:   * Add a new outfit to user wardrobe.
src/modules/narrative/services/wardrobeService.ts:   */

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    // 1. 建立候選池

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    // 2. 硬性篩選：性別

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    );
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    // Fallback：候選池仍為空，返回預設

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    // 4. 評分制選擇

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    let currentSeason: string;

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    }

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:        let score = 0;
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:        // 風格吻合（+40分）：style_archetype 在偏好列表裡

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:        else if (Math.abs(o.aesthetic_tier - targetTier) === 1) {
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:            score += 15;
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:        }
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:        // 季節吻合（+25分）

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:        if (outfitSeason === 'all') {

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:        return { outfit: o, score };

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:
src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    // 找最高分

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    // Final hard filter for banned keywords

src/modules/narrative/services/narrativeService.ts:    });

src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:const translateOutfitTerm = (text: string | null | undefined): string => {
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:    if (!text) return "";
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:    let result = text;
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:    // 依字長排序，先翻長詞才不會被短詞先吃掉
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:    const sortedKeys = Object.keys(TERM_DICT).sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length);
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:    for (const key of sortedKeys) {
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:        const regex = new RegExp(`\\b${key}\\b`, 'gi');
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:        result = result.replace(regex, TERM_DICT[key]);
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:    }
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:    return result;
src/modules/narrative/components/WardrobeManager.tsx:};

src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:const getAspectRatioFromUrl = async (url: string): Promise<string> => {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    let finalUrl = url;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    if (url.startsWith('idb://')) {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        const blobUrl = await imageDB.getUrl(url);
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        if (blobUrl) finalUrl = blobUrl;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    }
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    return new Promise((resolve) => {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        const img = new Image();
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        img.onload = () => {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            const ratio = img.naturalWidth / img.naturalHeight;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            if (url.startsWith('idb://') && finalUrl.startsWith('blob:')) {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:                URL.revokeObjectURL(finalUrl);
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            }
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            if (ratio > 1.2) resolve("16:9");
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            else if (ratio > 0.8) resolve("1:1");
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            else if (ratio > 0.6) resolve("3:4");
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            else resolve("9:16");
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        };
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        img.onerror = () => {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            if (url.startsWith('idb://') && finalUrl.startsWith('blob:')) {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:                URL.revokeObjectURL(finalUrl);
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            }
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            resolve("3:4"); // Fallback
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        };
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        img.src = finalUrl;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    });
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:};
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:/**
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts: * 根據分類判斷需要「保護」的區域
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts: * 加強正則表達式，支援包含特定關鍵字的品類名稱
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts: */
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:const getProtectionInstruction = (category: string): string => {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    const cat = category.toLowerCase();
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    // 如果是下身類（包含任何有「褲」或「裙」的名稱）
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    if (cat.match(/bottom|pants|shorts|skirt|jeans|leggings|褲|裙|下身/)) {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        return `
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        [🛡️ ZONAL PROTECTION - UPPER SECTION]: 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        STRICTLY PRESERVE the pixels of the UPPER SECTION (torso, existing top garment, neck) from Asset 3. 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        DO NOT alter the existing upper attire. Focus changes ONLY on the lower section from waist down.`;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    }
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    // 如果是上身類（包含任何有「衣」、「衫」、「外套」的名稱）
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    if (cat.match(/top|shirt|blouse|tee|jacket|outerwear|blazer|vest|cardigan|衣|衫|外套|夾克|背心|上身/)) {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        return `
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        [🛡️ ZONAL PROTECTION - LOWER SECTION]: 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        STRICTLY PRESERVE the pixels of the LOWER SECTION (waist down, existing bottom garment, legs, footwear) from Asset 3. 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        DO NOT alter the existing lower attire. Focus changes ONLY on the upper section.`;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    }
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    // 如果是配件類（包包、鞋子、飾品）
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    if (cat.match(/bag|shoe|accessory|hat|glass|包|鞋|飾|帽|鏡/)) {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        return `
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        [🛡️ FULL BODY PROTECTION]: 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        STRICTLY PRESERVE the model's entire body and existing clothing from Asset 3. 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        ADD the accessory from Asset 2 to the appropriate location (e.g., hand for bag, feet for shoes, head for hat). 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        Ensure natural interaction, shadows, and occlusion with the existing scene.`;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    }

src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:// Remove Apparel Background using Gemini Vision
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:export const removeApparelBackground = async (apparelImage: {data: string, mimeType: string}): Promise<{data: string, mimeType: string}> => {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    const client = await getGeminiClient(false); // Use Flash for speed
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    const prompt = `
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    [TASK: BACKGROUND REMOVAL & ASSET EXTRACTION]
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    Extract the garment from the provided image. 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    Output the garment isolated on a clean, solid white background. 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    Maintain all original textures, colors, and details of the garment. 
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    Do not include any hangers, mannequins, or background elements.
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    `;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    const response = await client.models.generateContent({
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        model: 'gemini-2.5-flash-image',
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        contents: [
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            { inlineData: apparelImage },
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            { text: prompt }
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        ],
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        config: {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            responseModalities: [Modality.IMAGE]
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        }
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    });
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    const resultPart = response.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.find(p => p.inlineData);
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    if (resultPart && resultPart.inlineData) {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        return {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            data: resultPart.inlineData.data,
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:            mimeType: resultPart.inlineData.mimeType
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        };
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    }
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    return apparelImage; // Fallback to original if failed
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:};

src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    Identify and describe the following for pixel-perfect replication:
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    1. MATERIAL DNA: (e.g., "Heavyweight 14oz raw denim", "19mm mulberry silk satin", "3-gauge chunky cable knit")
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    2. LIGHT INTERACTION: (e.g., "High specular highlights on silk", "Matte light absorption on cotton", "Metallic shimmer on sequins")

src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    Output a detailed, comma-separated list of these features in English.
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    Focus on descriptors that will help an AI image generator maintain the EXACT material feel.

src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:export const applyMultiAngleMatrix = async (
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    matrix: {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        angleId: string;

src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    const results: Record<string, string> = {};
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:    const tasks = matrix.map(item => async () => {
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        const { angleId, modelImage, apparelImage } = item;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        // If no apparel for this angle, we might use the front apparel as fallback or skip
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        // For now, if no apparel provided for specific angle, we skip or use a default if available
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        if (!apparelImage) return;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        onProgress(angleId, `正在生成 ${angleId} 角度...`);
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        // Custom prompt enhancement for weights
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        let weightInstruction = "";
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/services/fittingService.ts:        if (angleId === 'side' || angleId === 'angle' || angleId === 'back') {

src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            setBaseImage(imgObj);
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            const img = new Image();
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            // 使用 base64 數據而不是原始 URL，以確保能正確解碼（特別是 idb:// URL）
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            img.src = `data:${imgObj.fileData.mimeType};base64,${imgObj.fileData.data}`;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            await img.decode();
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            const ratio = img.naturalWidth / img.naturalHeight;
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            if (ratio > 1.2) setTargetAspectRatio("16:9");
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            else if (ratio > 0.8) setTargetAspectRatio("1:1");
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            else if (ratio > 0.6) setTargetAspectRatio("3:4");
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            else setTargetAspectRatio("9:16");
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:            const cropData = await autoFaceCrop(imgObj.fileData);

src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:        }
src/modules/virtualFittingRoom/VirtualFittingRoom.tsx:    }, [resetHistory]);

src/modules/compositeCard/CompositeCardStudio.tsx:                                [next[sIdx], next[dIdx]] = [next[dIdx], next[sIdx]];
src/modules/compositeCard/CompositeCardStudio.tsx:                                return next;

src/modules/compositeCard/CompositeCardStudio.tsx:                  onUpdatePair={(i, f, v) => { const n = [...burstPairs]; n[i] = {...n[i], [f]: v}; setBurstPairs(n); }}

src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:            const video = document.createElement('video');
src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:            video.src = videoUrl;
src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:            video.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';

src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:            video.onloadedmetadata = () => {
src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:                // Capture at 20% of video length to avoid intro black frames, or 1s if very short
src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:                let seekTime = video.duration * 0.2; 
src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:                if (isNaN(seekTime) || seekTime === 0) seekTime = 1;
src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:                video.currentTime = seekTime;
src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:            };

src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:                    return;
src/modules/cinematic/CinematicAnalyzer.tsx:                }
